nodes.speaker: Spire Warden
nodes.text: Legends say only those bearing the Windward Seal may ride the lift up to the highest floors of the spire. Seek an audience with the Queen of the Fae in Faerie Glade, millenia ago the Fae were charged with protecting the seal.

nodes.speaker: Spire Warden
nodes.text: The seal is an ancient key. The Fae know of such things.

nodes.speaker: Spire Warden
nodes.text: The lift stands ready. Use it when you are prepared.
